args.search_query: United States Steel Corporation 8-K December 18 2023 Nippon Steel merger filing site:sec.gov

tool_calls.purpose: Find the SEC 8-K filing from December 18, 2023 that announced the merger agreement, which should contain operational plans, synergies, investment commitments, and workforce details.

args.search_query: US Steel 10-K 2024 Nippon Steel merger operational impact workforce investment cost savings

tool_calls.purpose: Find the most recent 10-K (year ended December 31, 2024) for US Steel to understand how the merger is discussed in terms of operational impacts, risks, and any forward-looking statements about investments, cost synergies, or supply chain.
